You slowly open a single eye, trying to make sense of this. You realize must've burrowed deeper into the sleeping bag during your rest, as you can feel its warmth embrace you from all sides. Only a bit of light pours in through the opening ahead, but you can still see the prone form of the Celebi you encountered yesterday laying just before you. Looking down you discover your pillow, barely being able to discern the wide soles of two very familiar feet in the darkness. Their plush surface must have lovingly supported your sleeping head throughout the night. You silently curse yourself. How do you keep ending up in these situations?

One of the feet rises up and slowly starts rubbing along your cheek, like it senses your distress and wishes to comfort you. Or it misses the warmth your face provided throughout the night, and is now attempting to reclaim it..

You tiredly gaze up at the green fairy, expecting her to be looking back with that familiar smirk of hers, eager to start another day of playtime. Instead she still looks fast asleep, the foot having either developed a mind of its own or being urged onward by her dreams.

You briefly wonder what she's dreaming about. Maybe it's about you, and she's happily tormenting your dream-self underneath her feet again. Maybe he's even eagerly playing along? Enthusiastically serving and worshiping them without her even having to ask. You quickly decide you don't really care. While she's preoccupied in her dreams, you're free from her games and psychic encouragement to participate.

You remove your face from her affectionate foot and shift towards the side of the cloth cave, trying to catch some more sleep. It's not long before the playful foot returns however. This time gently rubbing against your forehead, before trailing down your nose and nestling itself against your mouth. Its tip gently flicks at your bottom lip before retreating and resting on top of your head. You faintly taste something on your lips. Salty and... Tomato? Right. She never did wash them properly before going to sleep, did she?

You decide to take another glance towards the grass type, She's either really good at faking it, or she's still soundly asleep. You see her roll over and, before you know it, her second foot joins the first in its fun. It slides over your hair and slowly pats against your cheek and chin. You realize your face is feeling slightly moist wherever the pair passes. They must've started to sweat, confined in depths of the stuffy sleeping bag.

You dejectedly accept you're not getting any more rest, the feet frolicking over your face sure to stop any attempt. The next best thing would be to climb out of the confined space into fresh air to get a few moments of peace and quiet before Celebi wakes up. But, looking at the distant opening of your sleeping bag, you realize getting out might be harder than you had hoped. Now that you're not sleeping side by side anymore, the dreaming pokemon has eagerly abused her newfound freedom and laid claim to as much space as she could. You're not sure if you can shimmy past without bumping into her and accidentally waking her up. You're unsure how fast she sleeps and how her morning temper is, and you're not sure you want to find out either.

Then again, the only other option is staying put, effectively volunteering your face as a toy for her feet until she wakes up on her own terms. An offer you're sure the playful pair currently exploring said face would be all too eager to abuse. Further, you also doubt you'll like her reaction when she wakes up and finds that you've already willingly submerged yourself beneath her feet. It's bound to make Celebi ecstatic though, so maybe it will be worth it in the long run?

You...
1111221212122.title: ... she shrugs and curls up beside you.

11112212121221.content:
Upon deciding that your face is no toy for this sleeping fairy, and that you don't want to spend another minute with her feet crawling up and down it, you decide to take the risk and try to climb out of the sleeping bag.

So, determined to get out, you focus on your first task: pull her feet off your face.

Carefully, but impatiently, you get a hold of Celebi's left ankle, and as gently as you can, you pull her foot off your face and lay it on the padded floor, before doing the same thing with its twin counterpart. Then, you rise your head, to see if the fairy woke up in the process.

Luckily, she didn't. You see her letting out a light moan, but her black eyelids remain sealed, meaning that she's still fast asleep.

‘Good’ you think to yourself as you mentally prepare to accomplish your second goal: getting out of here.

As slowly and carefully as you can, you start crawling forward, in direction of the opening, but also towards the green, living barrier that lays in front of it.

Sighing lowly, you start crawling through the right space between her and one of the walls of the sleeping bag, your body making contact with hers.
"Biii..." you hear the fairy moaning again.

You halt, holding your breath, fearing that even the slightest noise would call the fairy back to reality. You definitely prefer her asleep.

You start crawling again but, just as you're side by side with Celebi again, the fairy rolls on her side, her long arms wrapping around your neck.

Your heart skips a beat as you wait for either her to wake up and finds herself like this or she lets go of you so you can resume your task and get out.

Seconds pass, minutes even, but the fairy gives no sign of wanting to wake up or get off you. You feel her warm breath being blown in your face as she snores softly.

Suddenly, you feel something poking your lower body and, looking down, you discover that it's her feet again!

One of the two gently rubs itself on your midsection, while the other insistently (and less gently) pokes your belly. It's almost like they missed your face, and they're pleading you to get back inside to 'play'.

You watch them rub themselves around your lower body, when the fairy suddenly moves hers upwards, both legs rising themselves and almost kicking you in the stomach.

And, showing an incredible flexibility, the fairy lays both her feet on your chest, while her arms are still wrapped around your neck. And, from this shorter distance, the grassy smell of her scented feet starts to travel up to your nose, making its way inside your nostrils. Even when you got pretty used to it, it still is annoying.

"Not again..." you mutter to yourself as you opt for a hasty decision. You carefully grab Celebi by her sides, and gently try to push her off.

But the fairy has a solid grasp around your neck, and plus, she has no intention of letting go.
"Come on Celebi, get off!" you cry as you finally manage to wrest the fairy off you and laying her as far from you as you can - which is a really short distance.

Taking advantage of this newfound freedom, you once again starting crawling and, with no living barrier getting in the way anymore, you soon reach the opening of the padded sack and crawl out.

For the first time since you're awake, you manage to breath in fresh air. Pure, fresh, wonderful fresh air, that isn't the stuffy one present in the sleeping bag, nor the scented one emanated from the feet of your 'captress'.

As soon as you fully get out, you get away from the sleeping bag. Not that you want to run away though. You need your original size back first.

But, for now, you just need to put a good distance between you and the green fairy, who is still sleeping soundly inside of your sleeping bag.

Sighing, you go sit down in front of a tree, leaning with your back against the trunk.

And you remain perfectly still, doing nothing but inhaling the morning air to counter the smell of Celebi's feet that is still very present in your nose.

Until you notice something moving inside your sleeping bag. And you hear a loud cry:
"Biiii!" you assume the the fairy just yawned.

Slowly you get up and walk towards the bag, deciding to check if the fairy woke up. You figure out that if she finds you too far from her, she'll assume that you wanted to flee, and she'll simply shrink you down to size as a punishment...

You shudder at the thought, and halt in front of the sleeping bag, looking into the opening to see...
11112212121221.title: A hard task

choices: You improvise a bed to catch some more sleep.
111122121212212.content:
Celebi's still sleeping. You breathe a sigh of relief. You're not sure if you could handle her antics so soon after waking up. You walk around a bit to shake the stiffness from your limbs while greedily gulping down the clean forest air. Your enjoyment of the fresh air is short lived, as the familiar odor of the grass-type's soft soles quickly floods your nose again. Confused, you try again. But despite your best efforts to replace the scent of the fairy's feet with the smell of fresh pine, you can't seem to get rid of it. You must have slept on the pokémon's soles longer than you thought, filling your lungs with their fragrance for hours on end. Now happily nestled within you, it looks like you'll get to keep enjoying their aroma every time you exhale. At least for a while, until it clears out of your system.

You quickly look around to shift your mind to something else, away from the idea that her feet managed to ingrain themselves into you in some way. Your gaze stops on Celebi herself, still happily dreaming. Although... she seems more restless than you remember. Her closed eyes are clearly frowning, and you can see her fists clench tightly into the fabric of the sleeping bag. You briefly worry that something might be wrong with her, but then a movement from within the bedroll catches your attention. Something's frantically moving around in there. For a second, you believe some kind of insect pokémon became trapped in there, before you realize the more likely explanation.

It's her feet looking for their newest little toy - you. You can't be certain how your face's presence against her soles influenced her dreams, but it's clear its sudden absence is now also having an effect. Seeing the sleeping pokémon in distress like this, you actually feel a bit sorry for her. She obviously isn't trying to purposefully hurt you, you're certain you'd know pretty quickly if she was. And yes, while definitely not pleasant, the feeling of her feet pushing and prodding at you isn't the worst you've ever experienced. This is all just a great big game to her, and you just took her fun away. Maybe you should just...

No. You quickly shake your head, trying to physically force that train of thought out of your mind. You're not even sure where that came from.

Looking back down at the grass-type it's clear that, despite her restless fidgeting, she'll be sleeping for a good while longer. You could do with some more shut-eye of yourself. Though, unwilling to venture back into the bedroll and put yourself at the mercy of her feet once again, you'll have to figure something else out. Maybe you could drag over a spare shirt from your bag to double as a mattress and blanket. Ofcourse, if she wakes up before you, you'll probably be waking up to a face-full of fairy feet.

Alternatively, you can ignore your lingering drowsiness and start preparing breakfast. The smell will probably wake her up faster, but maybe a decent meal will put her in a good enough mood to keep her games to a minimum.
111122121212212.title: Celebi is still asleep...

choices: Celebi wakes up first, and she's in a playful mood...
You wake up first and start preparing breakfast
1111221212122121.content:
Even if you can feel your own stomach growling softly, asking to be satisfied, you decide that you might as well catch five more minutes of well-desired sleep.

After all, even when the fairy's sleep is disturbed by the sudden lack of you in the sleeping bag, she won't be waking up for a good while, in which you get to sleep without being subjected to the smell of her feet nor them using your face as a toy.

It's a too tempting chance and you can't possibly miss it. Nor you want to miss it.

So, yawning again, you make your way towards your bag, which is laying near the bedroll where a certain time traveler is sleeping.

A sudden thought makes you stop your walking.

If you make too much noise, the fairy will wake up.

If the noise wakes the fairy up, and she finds you - her toy - nowhere in sight, she could be annoyed.

If the fairy is annoyed, she'll shrink you down and use you as a foot-toy again.

The blood momentarily leaves your face at the perspective. As a result, you go pale as death itself.

Quite certainly, you don't wish to be used as a foot-toy again, forced to worship and lick the feet of that mischievous legendary.

But, again, your lack of sleep manifests itself in yet another, deep yawn finding its way out of your mouth.
"I'll make sure that I don't make too much noise." you drowsily mumble to yourself as you walk up to your bag.

The bag is still bigger than you, meaning that it would be impossible for you to reach inside of it without having to push it on the ground.

But you quickly discard the idea. That would surely make noise. So, you put your drowsy brain to work. And, soon, you get an idea.

Sighing, you get a hold of the bag and, not without difficulty, you drag it to a nearby, fallen log. You push the bag against it, before climbing on the log. This position grants you easy access to your bag, and you quickly dig yourself into it, only to emerge from it with one of your spare shirts, which is currently at least twice your height.

You place it down on the log next to you, before digging into the bag again, this time grabbing a hold of a bag of cotton wool you had brought along with you, in case you got injured.

Sadly, the bag is wedged between something. You pull harder, and you luckily manage to pull it out without making the slightest noise.

Sighing in relief, you grab the objects to improvise a decent bed and you leap off the log, starting to walking to your previous spot, as far as possible from your sleeping bag, near some random tree.

But, as you walk, your bag happens to fall down, producing a non-indifferent noise because of the pots that are inside of it.

You abruptly halt, and bite your lower lip, fearing that the noise might have woken Celebi up.

That'd be really bad for your intentions of getting a few more moments of shut-eye.

Almost mechanically, you glance back at your bedroll. And your blood almost freezes as you see the fairy yawning:
"Biiiiii!" for a moment, you watch as she rolls in her sleep.

But, much to your relief, those black eyelids of hers don't part like you expected, remaining sealed instead. Only then you dare to breath again.

So, once you made sure that the fairy is still fast asleep, you gently place the shirt on the ground and lay down on it. It's large enough to even wrap it around yourself like a blanket. Then, you proceed to place the cotton wool beneath your head. It's nothing near your sleeping bag, but at least you won't be sleeping on the grass. Better than nothing, you guess.

You close your eyes and, relieved to have at least a short break from Celebi's feet being anywhere on your body, you relax.

You also take notice that the persistent smell of the time traveler's feet is finally starting to find its way out from your poor lungs, fresh air emanated from the trees starting to replace the scented one that bothered you for... you don't even know how much time you spent with her feet already!

Soon, your drowsiness sweetly claims your consciousness as you fall asleep again...
1111221212122121.title: Five more minutes of sleep

choices: She's clueless and accepts your explanation
She knows what really happened during the night. Uh-oh.
11112212121221211.content:
Your sleep is disturbed by a sudden weight on your legs. It's not painful, or even uncomfortable. You shift your legs a bit underneath it. It feels malleable through your improvised blanket, and slightly warm. You try to ignore the feeling and return back to sleep's welcome embrace.

Oddly, the weight seems to be gradually increasing. Not too long after it's joined by a twin, this one covering most of your belly and chest. A muffled giggle appears from somewhere above, and the weight on your chest also starts to grow. Recognizing you won't be able to catch sleep again under the mysterious assault, you groggily open your eyes to find the cause of your interrupted nap.

You easily spot the culprit. Celebi is standing on top of your prone body. Her back foot is on your legs, while the other one rests on top of your chest. She seems to be trying her hardest to stop herself from bursting out laughing while stepping on you. A confused grunt from you catches her attention, and she gleefully smiles down at you. Slowly and deliberately, she raises her back foot off your legs and guides it to hover over your face. You see its bottom is once again covered in crushed grass and dirt. She flashes you one last cocky grin before planting it firmly on top of your face, smothering it in the soft warmth of her big, green sole.

It's not long before its weight starts to increase again, and you realize you should probably get her off. You try to do so, but you've barely lifted your arms before the foot leaves you of its own accord to join its mistress above you. You crane your neck up to see what she's doing and find that, having run out of you to walk on, the time-traveler spins around and takes a seat just above your head, planting both feet on either side of your it.

"Mhm... Good morning Celebi". You try, deciding not to question her morning walk on top of you for now.

"Bii", the pokemon happily responds.

"Bi Bi Biii Bi?", she tries.

At your confused expression, she tries again. This time pointing to you, then herself and then your empty bedroll. Then to you again, and finally to your improvised bed.

"Ah, you want to know why I got out of the sleeping bag?"

"Bi!" She happily nods.

"Well, I...-" You trail off, feeling an odd sensation against your cheek. A sideways glance reveals that it's her foot, lovingly caressing you as Celebi listens patiently to your explanation. The feeling of her sole rubbing along your cheek reminds you of her feet's nightly excursion over your face. You look up at her alarmed. Does she know? It doesn't look like it, she's just waiting for you to continue.

"W-Well..." you try again, stammering this time. Her foot's affectionate display towards your face keeps your mind drifting back to the gentle nudges and strokes it received from them during the night. You can't let her know what happened. "Y-You see, us being stuck together like that, I couldn't really get comfortable. You seemed fast asleep already, so I snuck out and made a bed of my own to sleep in".

Celebi looks at you questioningly. She clearly picked up on your change in demeanor. You see her eyes closing, as she ponders your answer.

Oh no, you realize. Celebi is a psychic type. She couldn't be trying to read your mind, could she? You try to calm yourself down a little. If Celebi could read minds, you're certain it'd be something more widely known. Then again, you haven't heard any stories of Celebi shrinking people down either.

You nervously wait for a reaction from the green pokemon.
11112212121221211.title: Celebi wakes up first, and she's in a playf...

choices: Celebi points to her feet... she's eager to start playing...
She wants to try another kind of game...
111122121212212111.content:
You lay there, awaiting for the fairy's reply to your explanation, hoping that she'll buy it.
"Bii," you hear her muttering as she processes your words. Her foot keeps rubbing the side of your face as she thinks.

Then, Celebi opens her eyes again and smiles.
"Bi!" she exclaims happily. It sounded like ‘Okay!’ so you assume that she's pleased with your explanation.

Sighing in relief, you close your eyes, trying to catch one more minute of relax.

But, of course, Celebi won't let you.

She's awake now, and it means that a great new day of games with her toy had just begun.

"Bii!" she giggles, hovering upwards and shoving one of her feet into your face, the smell hitting your nose as the foot physically assaults your face.
‘Get up, you lazy toy!’ she seems to be saying.

"Alright! Alright, I'm awake!" you huff with a not-so-subtle hint of annoyance as you move a hand to get a hold of Celebi's foot, removing it from your face.

"Bi!" Celebi giggles again as you unwrap your shirt from your body and rise your head from the bag of cotton wool.

"Happy now?" you growl, before yawning loudly while your hands travel to your eyes as you start rubbing them, deliberately doing it as slowly as you can, not quite willing to start another day as a toy to this time traveling grass type fairy.

You open your eyes again and look at Celebi, who stares back at you with an expectant look.
"Bi~iii!" she sings, rising her foot to your face and repeatedly pointing at it with one of her paws.

"Are you already eager to play?" you ask, not sure of how she could be so cheerful so early in the morning. Celebi shakes her head almost frenetically, and points at her foot with more energy.

"Wait. I don't know about you, but I, uh, need something in my stomach before... 'playing'," you remark. As if wanting to help you, your stomach growls in this precise moment, asking to be filled with the first one of its daily meals.
"Hear that?" you say.

Celebi's smirk drops, but nonetheless she lowers her foot down as she nods her head in an understanding manner. Soon enough, you hear her stomach growling as well, suggesting the reason of why she's letting your refusal slide so easily.

"Hungry?" you unnecessarily ask with a smirk as you make your way to your bag, which is still laying on the ground in front of the fallen log where you left it when you got asleep again.

--

You emerge from your bag holding a bottle of moomoo milk, a few Lava Cookies and a sitrus berry. You remember Celebi using your soup as a foot bath yesterday evening.

For a moment, you wonder if she could do the same with your milk, before deciding that it's a stupid idea. There is difference between a pot and a bottle after all, her feet would luckily never fit in the second one.

You take a seat on the log, the green fairy sitting next to you.
"Here, try one of these," you mutter as you hand her a Lava Cookie, before biting in your own meal.

You watch as the fairy hesitantly bites her cookie, before deciding that it's not only edible, but delicious! You choke back a laugh and watch as she devours the whole cookie in two bites.

--

You take one last sip of milk, before letting out a satisfied sigh, meaning that you're full. And, judging from the pleased look on her face, Celebi is as well. Which is a good thing.

A pleased Celebi means a reduced chance of being shrunk and used as a foot toy from her today.

Lost in your own thoughts, you don't even feel a green paw belonging to a certain time traveler poking you repeatedly.

"Bi!" this cry effectively stops your train of thought. That and the green fairy's paw making contact with your side, hitting you with a somewhat painful blow.

"Ow!" you cry as you look at her with annoyance, silently asking the reason of why she just hit you. In response, the fairy smirks that familiar smirk of hers.

The annoyance fades from your face as you recognize that expectant look, the same one she uses whenever Celebi wants to play...
111122121212212111.title: Rise and shine!

1111221212122121111.content:
You knew it was inevitable. Still, you look away, trying to ignore her silent command.

"Biiiiiii" The Celebi whines, trying to catch your attention, to get you to start.

"Listen, Celebi", you start, "Can't we first....".

"Bi!", she cuts you off, looking sternly at you before pointing decisively at her feet one last time. Knowing that further refusal would only encourage the fairy to use her psychic prowess against you again, you relent. You sit up straight, and halfheartedly motion the time-traveler to take a seat as well. Seeing that you've decided to obey, the fairy's frown is quickly replaced by a wide smile as she plops her but down onto the ground and eagerly presents her green soles to you once more.

Having resigned yourself to the task at hand, you gently lift up her left foot and place it into your lap. You look over to Celebi, expecting her to show you exactly what she wants you to do. Instead, you see that the fairy has laid flat on her back, eyes closed. Her foot starts tapping against your stomach, encouraging you to get started. It seems like she's content to let you decide what to do this time.

Uncertain, you reach over to your blanket/shirt. You'd already seen an up close view how her soles were once again littered with bits of plants, pebbles and sand, and decided to remedy that first. Using the shirt like an ordinary rag, you swipe away the larger bits of debris clinging to her foot before putting more effort in rubbing away the more stubborn smudges of dirt off her sole. Once you manage to get the foot clean, you give decide to give it a massage. You place one hand right next to her heel, the other underneath the ball of her foot, before pressing your thumbs deep into her malleable skin. It's evident you're doing something right, as Celebi starts softly murmuring in approval, pushing her foot deeper into your caring hands.

The job is made much easier this time by your increased size, and soon you find yourself kneading at parts of the sole you swear you'd already tended too. You're uncertain how to continue. While Celebi clearly doesn't mind, you don't want to spend the entire day tending to her feet. However, you also don't want to risk annoying her by stopping too soon. You look over to her face again, hoping for a signal to allow you to start on lefty's twin, but the relaxed pokemon hasn't opened her eyes since you started.

Unable to think of another way to cut the massage short without raising her ire, you slowly raise her foot until it's level with your head, and gently bring it closer to your face. You feel the ball of her foot bump against your forehead and stop, hesitant to proceed. You can see the small wrinkles covering her sole, feel the faint smell of grass fill your nose once again. The top of her foot lovingly strokes your hair, seemingly sensing what is about to happen and urging you to continue, eager to feel your lips against its fragrant skin. Closing your eyes, you push past your doubts and press your lips into the warm sole covering your face. you feel the muscles underneath tense and shift, as if trying to return the gesture. Before you can even wonder how long you should hold the kiss, the decision is made for you. The foot slowly lowers of its own accord to reveal a pair of big, blue eyes staring right at you.

Time seems to stand still as you look into each others eyes. But then, slowly but surely, an impossibly big smile starts to spread over Celebi's face.

The smile, and the rest of her face, quickly get eclipsed by her right foot, still generously coated in the bits and pieces it picked up off the forest floor, which she now enthusiastically starts waving in front of your face.

You curse yourself for encouraging her

"Bi! Bi Bi! Bi!", she happily squeels at you.

"Celebi, wait! Let me expl-mmmfff", you start, before an invisible force pushes your head into the soft embrace of her foot. The rest of your protest is smothered into nothingness against the plush skin as you feel her damp sole mold to your face and flood your mouth with its taste. You desperately to get it off you, but Celebi's psychic prowess keeps her foot glued firmly to your face. Feeling your tongue brush over her sensitive sole during your frantic struggle only emboldens her further.

After you finally - with some difficulty - manage to pry the affectionate foot off your face, you collapse to the ground. You roll over onto your back to try and catch your breath. You only dare to look back at the fairy once you've recovered a bit, and see her glancing back sheepishly. A small blush appears on her cheeks as she realizes she went slightly overboard.

--------------

"Let's uh... let's forget that ever happened", you hesitantly offer once you managed to get back to your feet. The fairy smugly grins at you, before quickly shaking her head.

"Well, could you at least lend a hand in packing up our camp?", you continue dejectedly, "I'd manage on my own at my normal size, but now that everything's more than twice as large..."

Celebi ponders for a moment, before stretching out her hands towards your things. You wonder what she's up too, but then you see you things slowly shrink down, until they're normal sized to you. You look back at the pokemon, but see she's already taken a seat at the foot of a nearby tree, motioning you to get started. You guess you can just be happy for the fact that she didn't try to continue any of her games...

The morning is already half past when you finally manage to pack everything back into your bag.

"Alright, I think i got everything", you exclaim.

"You ready to go?" you ask, as Celebi quickly flies up to you. She doesn't respond, instead taking great interest in the backpack perched on your shoulders. You're about to ask if something was wrong, when she flutters up directly above you. Soon after, you see two very familiar feet descend on either side of you as she takes a seat on top of your pack. Her heels kick lightly against your chest as you feel her paw tap against your scalp.

"Bi!", she exclaims, giving you the command to march. You silently grit your teeth, more out of embarrassment at being used as a pack mule than out of difficulty to carry her, before setting off.

you make some good progress deeper into the forest, before...
1111221212122121111.title: Celebi points to her feet... she's eager to...

choices: Celebi grows into a giantess! Though you may not grow to normal!
11112212121221211112.content:
Celebi let out a sigh. Her boredness was becoming troublesome.
As you saw she was bored, you decide it might be a good chance to try to get big again.
"How about you make me big again, Celebi?" you say with a smile.

"Bi.. Bi, bi!" then you realize she's getting some weird idea.
She hops off of your back and grins down at you, deciding what would happen.
11112212121221211112.title: Celebi grows bored again.

choices: Celebi moves her feet on you, wanting to start playing again...
Celebi turns around showing you her rear, ready for a different approach...
111122121212212111121.content:
You stare at the grass type fairy, who lazily floats around in a bored fashion.

"So? Will you grow me back to normal?" you ask again, not bothering to hide the hope in your voice.

A thought finds its way among the others in your head.

If Celebi grows you back to your original size... how will you manage to get rid of her? The best shot you've got would be running as fast as you can... you quickly discard the idea.

A wrong step, and Celebi would incapacitate you with her psychic powers, shrink you down to a microscopic size again and use you as a foot toy again.

Something you don't want to experience again.

However, your hopes are shattered, and a loud sigh escapes your mouth as you see Celebi turning around and shaking her head, responding to your previous question.

"Fine." you mumble.
"Let's get going then." you turn around, starting to walk again, not even letting the fairy hop on top of your bag again. Carrying her is the last thing you wish for right now.

However, you take the little amount of five steps before being forced to stop, a cyan energy surrounding you. Soon enough, Celebi enters your eyesight again as she flutters in front of you. Her half-lidded eyes tell you one thing: she's bored.

And, with a good chance, she wants to play again...

However, you feign obliviousness, hoping that you're wrong about her intentions.
"What?" you ask as the psychic energy around you dies down, letting you move freely again.
"Biii..." Celebi says, pointing down.

Not at her feet like you expected, though. She's pointing to the ground, you notice.
"Y-You... you want to stop...?" you question. The fairy nods, before rising one of her legs, showing you the wide, green sole of her right foot. One of the fingers of her paw points at it.

A loud, annoyed scream echoes from the depths of your mind.
"You want to play again, don't you?" you ask. Celebi nods.

"Come on, Celebi, we're supposed to be getting out of the forest..." you complain, hoping to make her give up on the idea of playing.

However, the fairy is stubborn.
"Bi!" she exclaims, waving her paws back and forth.

You huff, knowing that she won't accept further complaining. You remove your bag from your shoulders and unceremoniously toss it aside on the ground.

Celebi's frown is replaced by a wide smile as she sits down, you doing the same. She pushes both her feet into your stomach, knocking the air out of your lungs.

As you inhale deeply to regain your breath, you try to figure out what should you do. You already massaged... worshipped the fairy's feet earlier, and it had disastrous results...

Not only that, but you fear that if you're too monotonous with your work, she won't be too pleased...

Sensing your hesitation, and not feeling your touch on her feet, the grass type opened her eyes again.
"Bi? Bi!" she exclaims, first curious, then impatient.

"I don't know what to do!" you snap back, irritated. Only to immediately regret speaking.

A sly smirk appears on the time traveler's face.
"Bi..." she says.

Suddenly, her bright blue eyes become even brighter as they glow azure...
"Ah!" you exclaim, startled, knowing what that glow is.

You fall back on your rear and try to get away, but the psychic energy soon engulfs you again.

Much to your horror, your surroundings start to grow bigger and bigger as you are yet again shrunk down to size by the green fairy, who watches with glee your size getting drained by her psychic powers.

Soon, the shrinking comes to an end. And you find yourself staring up at a monolithic Celebi, whose eyes stop glowing as a smug smile takes place on her face.

You gulp down as you watch the now gigantic fairy getting up and hovering above you.
"Bi~ii!" the giantess laughs at you.

You let out a frustrated cry. Laughing is the last thing you'd do now.

There.

It happened again. The fairy made you her shrunken human toy again.

Celebi soon stops laughing, and her gaze travels back on you as the giantess figures out what to do first.
111122121212212111121.title: Back to being a toy...

choices: Celebi stood up, wanting to step on you!
Celebi's feet grabbed a hold of you, beginning to grind you in between!
1111221212122121111211.content:
As she regarded your pitifully small body in the ground with that malicious smirk of hers, Celebi thought about what to do with you now.

You had no idea of what to do, huh? That was no problem, she had plenty of ideas about what you could have done to her precious little feet.

For starters, you could have...

Celebi lost her grin for a second; in front of you, your nemeses touched the ground as the fairy landed, looking deep in thought. You saw the smelly twins fidgeting on the ground, probably preparing themselves for your ‘performance’, coating themselves in dirt which you latterly had to remove, either with your hands or, dreadfully, with your tongue.

"C-Celebi?" you called out, trying to sound firm, but failing poorly. You've already been through this once, and it had been relatively harmless, but you still couldn't get used to the idea of being so tiny, helpless and, above all, powerless to stop the giant time-traveler from doing whatever she wanted with you.

Said pokemon looked still deep in thought, probably coming up with new ways to use her feet to ‘play’ with you, which meant an endless torture until she declared herself satisfied.

As for Celebi, she still couldn't find anything that you hadn't already done to her grass-scented feet.

You watched as the giant fairy in front of you carelessly sat down, causing the ground beneath you to tremble while causing you to fall on your own butt as well.

Somewhat startled, but glad that you currently weren't under her butt, you looked back up at Celebi, discovering that she was staring down at you intently.

"Bi." she said as her left paw rose, two of her fingers bending twice, before pointing to her foot as she beckoned you to get closer to it.

You sighed resignedly, knowing that you had to obey if you wanted your size back.

Begrudgingly, you slowly walked up to her towering sole, which was familiarly covered in crushed grass and sand.

You paled at the thought that you were probably going to lick it clean again. Your stomach growled, protesting loudly at the disgusting meal that was being offered to it.

"Bi." the owner of the foot drew your attention, causing you to look back at her.

Much to your delight, she was rubbing something invisible with her paw, before said paw pointed to you.

She wanted another simple foot-rub, you thought while silently thanking the giantess.

Slowly, you placed both your hands on her sole and began rubbing off the dirt, which happily transferred from her foot to your palms.

You groaned in disgust, while Celebi began moaning, pleased.

In the meantime, the mind of the fairy kept working as she tried to find new ways to play with you.

Quite a few involving your mouth came up, and she smiled at the idea of you licking or maybe kissing her sole, but a new one made her discard the scenario.

An eager smirk crawled across her face.

Since she had ‘captured’, she thought, you have been doing all the work. But now, it was going to be the exact opposite.

You weren't going to do anything, just stand still, while her feet had their way with you.

The time-traveler smirked even more widely as she stared at you, who were still busily rubbing her foot, worried by the sudden lack of pleased moans escaping the fairy.

She allowed herself to sigh contentedly as she watched you working.

You just had to finish this foot-rub. Then, you were going to ‘relax’, the fairy thought with a creepy grin.

--

After all the dirt and grime were removed by Celebi's first foot, she obviously commanded you to get to its identical counterpart, which you reluctantly did.

You swore that the second foot was in an even worse state than the first one was, being coated in even more dirt, but you just shook your head: it was probably your brain processing the still fresh memory of what you had to rub off from her first foot.

While you worked to scrub off the dirt while not particularly enjoying the smell, you looked up at Celebi, at least to distract yourself from the humiliating task you were given.

And you slowed down your rubbing as you spotted her grinning down at you, predatory.

She soon took notice that you were staring at her, and her from became even wider,

"Bi? Bi." she said, ‘Are you done? Perfect’.

You didn't like that creepy grin of hers, but you really liked the moment when her paw rose in the air, her three fingers rose as well.

That could only mean ‘Stop’.

Sighing in relief, you stepped back, watching the fairy as she grabbed her own foot and examined your work.

The first one was acceptable, she thought, but the second one - she shot you a disappointed expression - was still covered in a thin layer of dirt.

You winced at that disappointed look she was giving.

"H-Hey, you told me to stop!" you justified yourself.

That look lingered on the fairy's face for a couple seconds, before she allowed herself to smile and her paws to let go of her feet as she offered a shrug.

Your whole being seemed to emit a sigh of relief.

Which was shoved back down your throat as Celebi made her new idea clear to you.
1111221212122121111211.title: Celebi's new ideas

111122121212212111122.content:
Celebi grins down at you, a bright flash covers the area.
When you open your eyes again, you expect to see the, even before the flash, huge by comparison Celebi, but you see an even larger Celebi.
Her voice booms out above you as she stretches, loving her new 50 ft height.
You attempt to climb onto her foot and get her attention.
After climbing onto her foot, you realize, how would you get her to notice you?
But you're lucky, right after climbing onto her foot, she began to walk around.
A few trees crunching under her gargantuan feet. You wince as you realize that could have been you.
"Bi, bi, bi! Bi! Bi bi!" She remembers you were down there and begins to search for you, afraid you were crushed in her few first steps at her new size!
After seeing you, she smiles, deciding if she should grow you to normal, or just leave you microscopic.
111122121212212111122.title: Celebi grows into a giantess! Though you may no...

choices: Her foot is on top of you again!
1111221212122121111221.content:
Celebi lifted her foot over you. This was surely the end.

The seemingly goddess size pokemon stopped.

She knew this would be too much for you to handle!

You slowly began to feel tingly as you grew to normal..

Well not exactly normal. You're still a tad smaller.

But 6 inches is a fair trade off! You'd take 5 ft over 5 inches any day!

You were about to run when you got stopped by the world's biggest celebi.

"Bi.. Bi bi!" She said. She still wanted you.

You sigh and turn towards her. She jumps in happiness.

You gulp as you saw the massive craters her feet created.

"S-so uh.. What now, Celebi?" You ask worriedly.
1111221212122121111221.title: Grow you to normal!

choices: Another person joins you! Perhaps more Pokefeet!
She decided to give you a treat!
11112212121221211112212.content:
You let out a gasp as you were playfully pinned to her foot again.

"Bi, bi bi. Bi!" She exclaimed happily.

She began to rub her toes on you, grinning.

She sat down with a mild boom, pointing to her feet and making a rubbing motion.

You were hesitating

She began to give you a pouty face, pointing to her feet again.

You let out a sigh as you gave in, slowly starting to massage the huge soles.

It took hours to get the first foot. Well.. Nearly get it.

You still couldn't reach her toes.

You were gonna go get a ladder before she helped you up.

You landed face first, kissing her toes.

This caused the 50 ft Celebi to start loudly giggling. "BI!" She said in a super happy tone.
11112212121221211112212.title: Her foot is on top of you again!

111122121212212111122121.title: Another person joins you! Perhaps more Pokefeet!

1111221212122121111221212.content: Perhaps one in the Raltz/Kirlia/Gardevoir line?
1111221212122121111221212.title: Another pokemon!

choices: She ends up falling asleep. A chance to escape!
111122121212212111122122.content:
She moved her foot and brought you to her face.

"Bi, bi bi, bi bi bi. Bi." She said.

It roughly translates to "For being such a good playmate.. You get a treat!"

But you can't understand pokemon so you worried.

She lightly kissed your tiny body, smothering you in the process.

But oddly.. It was nice! You felt energized. Happy. Less stressed.

Was this a treat? You could only wonder.

And then she laid back and held you against her soft chest.

You could hear the beating of her giant. Something was off..

That was an "in love" heart beat! Strong and a little faster!

You had read this was the way to see if Celebi was in love!

Is it possible she truly likes you?
111122121212212111122122.title: She decided to give you a treat!

1111221212122121111221221.content:
You heard some very soft snoring. She was asleep!

You took the chance and tried to escape.

You freed yourself of her grip and ran for it.

You didn't get far. A psychic shield surrounded the area.

As you collided with the shield, you yelped in pain.

You heard rustling. You woke your captor.

She sat up slowly and stared at you, seeing you were trying to escape.

Her expression changed. She was truly hurt.

You try to lie and say you were just going to look for berries.

But she knew better.

She let out a sigh and said "Bi.. Bi bi.. Bi."

Roughly translates to "You may leave.. If you want.. Friend."

You felt bad and had to decide. Stay with her?
1111221212122121111221221.title: She ends up falling asleep. A chance to escape!

choices: A strange package falls from the sky!
11112212121221211112212211.content:
Feeling bad, you let out a long sigh and decide to stay.

She jumps in happiness, creating a small earthquake.

You gulp and quickly remember why it'd be a bad idea to annoy her.

She began to skip merrily around you. Trees, bushes, it all disappeared beneath her feet.

She plops back down in front of you, shoving her feet in your face.

You sigh as you brush the few debris off of her soft soles.

She spoke only one word. "Bi."

In human tongue? "Love."

Just then..

choices: A translation collar to understand pokemon!
111122121212212111122122112.content:
A crate landed behind Celebi.

She eeped as it smashed against the ground, spooking her.

She pushes you towards it so you can examine it.

It was..

choices: Celebi has started to stretch loudly. She's waking up!
the soles actually feel pretty pleasant. You're starting to enjoy this!?
11112212121222.content:
You know this wasn't going to be the most pleasant experience, but you really don't want to risk waking her up just yet. You decide to settle in as comfortable as you're able to, and subject yourself to whatever the sleeping pokemon has in store for you. She doesn't even know you're down here, surely it can't be that bad?

The feet seem to sense your lack of resistance, and grow bolder in their exploration. Whereas they previously just poked, prodded and rubbed against your face, You can now feel them start to crawl ontop of it. The air starts to smell like cut grass again as they continue their conquest, until it's all you can breathe as they reach past your nose. They only halt their advance when they've fully claimed your face, gently settling down on top of it.

You feel the rugged heels now rest on your forehead, with the rest of the feet extending down to completely submerge your face beneath them. The arches spill over your cheeks while her insteps form a small cavern around your nose, loading your every breath with the scent of her soles. The balls of her feet cover your mouth. Their occasional twitches gently peel open your lips to re-introduce the familiar taste of the feet to your mouth, while their tops idly curl around your chin.

The feet seem pleased with their new home, and you can feel them happily grind and twitch against you. Smothered beneath them like this, they completely dominate your senses. All you can see, hear, feel, taste and smell are the Celebi's soles, your entire world is confined to the warm skin now covering your face. You can feel the stale sweat they collected during the night rub off against your face, having it lightly stick to them. The air in your little breathing cave slowly grows more heavy and humid, utterly submerging you in their scent and making you struggle to take every new breath.

This is quickly becoming more than you can handle, and you raise your hands to remove them. You are just about to grab hold of her ankle to wrest the feet off you, but stop when you realize...
11112212121222.title: Stay put, and freely let her feet play you unti...

choices: She's wide awake, and looks pretty miffed at you. Uh oh...
Against all odds, she's still asleep!
111122121212222.content:
You're overwhelmed by the myriad of sensations Celebi’s feet are inflicting upon you; all while she was none the wiser. The hot, sticky scent of her soles enveloped you, and you had no choice but to take it in. The sheer mugginess of your confines made it almost impossible to catch your breath, so you just had to breathe in and out as fast as you could, the intense olfactory assault never relenting even slightly. Your mouth, pushed open as it was by the soft, squishy balls of the forest fairy’s feet, was forced to accept the tiny streams of salty sweat that ran down their contours. It was like you were trapped in an oven, or a superheated locker room.

An urge from your psyche to do something, anything, temporarily overcame the paralysis that came over you. You struggle to maneuver your arms, stuck as they were in the strangely restrictive inside of your sleeping bag. But as you did, you became wholly cognizant of one fact:

You were hard. And it wasn't just morning wood; it was a genuine display of arousal. You could even feel some pre staining your underwear. You tense up from the shock. Your mind short-circuits, fervently trying to deny the truth. Despite the panic disrupting your thought process, you can't help but think back to how you nuzzled your face into Celebi’s large, comfy soles, how their stale and grassy, yet pleasant aroma nearly lulled you to sleep, the teasing, intimate look on her face as she coaxed you into licking the soup off of her foot…

Your member twitches. Oh no…were you…enjoying this?!

You started hyperventilating, only to smother yourself further into the irresistible miasma of your owner’s soft, delicate feet. Your hands reverse their trajectory, and one of them instead careens down into your shorts. You grab your erection and gasp at how sensitive it is, which lets even more sweaty flesh protrude into your mouth. The balls of Celebi’s feet are now within a couple agonizing centimeters of your wanting tongue. Too far gone to care about your dignity now, you lick, pushing deep into the pudgy insteps, harvesting the rich, salty nectar from their shallow wrinkles. For a while, you just lay there, lavishing those feet with praise and steadily stroking yourself. (Un?)fortunately, your act of devotion wouldn't be going unnoticed.

“Biiii…~”

Celebi moaned dreamily, obviously pleased with your worship. You retract your tongue and freeze, deathly afraid that your greed might’ve woken her up. As aroused as you were now, you knew that letting the fairy catch on about what you were doing might mean that you’d never get back home. You feel your member twitch again. To your lustful side, the thought of just spending your life worshipping her feet sounds wonderful…

In lieu of shaking the thought out of your head, you beat your free fist against your thigh. You are NOT going to make a life-changing decision on horny impulses.

The toes of the fairy's right foot rammed hard against your closed mouth. “Biiii…!” She's obviously annoyed at the sudden lack of foot worship going on.

Your heart races in your chest. Hesitantly, you maneuver your face in such a way that allows you to take a peek at Celebi's face through her now-parted feet. Was she awake?
111122121212222.title: the soles actually feel pretty pleasant. You...

1111222.content:
The steady pressure over you squishes your cheeks and flattens your nose. Your nose wont be the only thing flattened soon if you don't get out of this.
