It gets closer, and closer, and soon your entire being is enveloped in the sultry, squishy grasp of Mawile's foot. Instantly, your clothes dampen, and you are introduced to the slight grime of dried sweat and dust that coats her skin. Your face, especially, was furthest in. If you weren't still in shock, you'd cry your eyes out and beat violently against the bulk of her ped, not that it would do anything other than tickle her.

But that's not the issue now; ever since the steel-type's sole consumed your vision, you've been holding in a breath you didn't know you had. It had to come out some time, and that time was, unfortunately, now. You exhale, but desperately try to fend off the urge to breathe, no matter how obviously wasted of an effort it was. It didn't take long for you to falter, though; your face was blue, and the instinctual need of air soon overpowered your disgust. You surrender to the incoming horror, and take a deep, desperate inhale.

An unspeakable, incomprehensible funk shot through your nostrils. The earthiness of the soil, the scent of grass, and overwhelmingly, the intense, all-encompassing miasma of stale, drying sweat flowed through your nose and straight into your lungs. You quivered violently, unprepared for anything close to this level of ripe. Any attempt at controlling your breathing was met with utter failure, the musk shattering what little concentration you could muster. Again, and again, you huffed the stench, relieving your body, but practically poisoning yourself in the process. Tears well up in your eyes as you realize just how completely helpless you were. Your life was up to Mawile now, and there was nothing you could do about it. You could still hear her snickering up above, even through the massive wall of foot that covered you.

After a few more agonizing breaths, you finally stabilize your breathing; however, it's plain as day that no matter how much time you spend here, the reek will never get better. At least you didn't open your mouth--

Without warning, the soft, filthy flesh around you starts pressing down. In no time, it starts to hurt; was she trying to kill you?! No, she wouldn't do that, right? She was having too much fun! Right?! She's not stopping, though! Why?!

A terrible thought rushes to the front of your mind. You know what she made you do when you were still normal-sized. Maybe...you had to do that now, with more strength than ever...

No! You've still got some dignity, damnit! If you obey her, she'll just keep you at her feet for the rest of your natural life! You're not gonna stoop this low just to stay with her forever, are you?!

...are you?
112112.title: Shrunken to a Speck with a Sadistic Steel-Type

113.content: Here are some more options just in case.
113.title: Meloetta

1133.content: Or would you rather just go with Meloetta? I mean this option did start with her.
1133.title: More

11331.content: Will she be a giantess? Or you shrink?
11331.title: Meloetta!

choices: Do as Meloetta wishes - worship her feet...
No way you're doing that - run!
113312.content:
You were taking a walk through the forest. No reason in particular, you just like doing that. It relaxes your mind. But little you know that you are being watched.

Suddenly, as you reach a clearing, a sound is heard. Nothing like cries of pokemon or the wind through the leaves.

No, it sounds more like... a song... and a beautiful, sweet one as well.

You try to find its source. But, as you take the minimum amount of three steps, your eyelids starts to feel heavy. You let out a yawn, and you find that you can't stand on your legs anymore.

Absentmindedly, you walk towards a tree and sit down, leaning with your back against your trunk.

In a matter of seconds, you lose consciousness and fall asleep; in the meantime, the tune changes.

If by any chance the first melody didn't do its job, you would have seen yourselves rapidly diminishing in height. And, soon, you lay there, unconscious, and as tall as a common bug.

The melody finally ends. From the branches of the trees above, a green headed, blue eyed pokemon smirks. Her powers did their job...

--

"Melo! Melo!" a voice cries. You adjust your position in your sleep.
"Mel!" the voice repeats. This time, something starts to shake you.

Mumbling something in your sleep, you adjust again.

"Mel!" with this loud cry, you suddenly feel a sharp pain taking over your body, successfully waking you up.

Your eyes shut open, and the first thing you notice is a white, slim pillar putting pressure on your chest, pinning you down, keeping you still, knocking the air out of your lungs and, most of all, causing you pain.

Coughing a bit, you slowly gaze upwards. You manage to make out the silhouette of a giant pokemon. It has green hair, blue eyes and a black 'dress'. Also, the pillar currently pinning you down, you realize, is its foot...

"Meloetta!" it cries upon seeing you awake, telling you what pokemon it is.

You know about Meloetta that she is admired by many because of her unique songs.

So... that melody you heard before...

"Mel!" she cries again, interrupting your thoughts by stepping on you harder, making you yelp in pain.

"S-Stop! Please!" you cry out in pain. The giantess smirks. She likes your pleads. It makes her feel... powerful. And she's sure that this new toy of hers will just make her day better.

Slowly, she lifts her foot off you, and leans down, roughly grabbing you with her black paw.

Meloetta takes your previous place as she sits down where you were being crushed not even a second ago. You're really glad that you're not currently under her butt.

But your relief is short lived as the dual-typed legendary leans forward, moving you towards her feet and placing you down in front of the white pillars.
"Melo!" she exclaims, bringing her paws in front of herself, and starting to rub an invisible surface, before pointing to you by her feet.

It takes a while for you to understand that she just instructed you to worship her feet.

You look upwards, trying to put up some resistance, but a mere look to the legendary tells you that any attempt of protest would end poorly for you.

Everything's happening too fast for you too handle. You just woke up, and found yourself shrunk and at the mercy of a singing giantess who just ordered you to worship her feet.

"Melo!" she cries impatiently, wagging her feet in front of you, eager to receive your servicing. You shake your head, soon understanding that you have just to options: do as she asks (more like demands!), or attempt to flee. How far could you get from the giantess? And, more importantly, how will you face you if she catches you?

Most probably, she's going to 'punish' you with the same feet she wants you to service. That aside, could you face the forest and its dangers at this size? And would get out unharmed? Those are two good points against running away. Plus, you obviously need your previous size back, and maybe, if you do as Meloetta wants, maybe she'll restore you.

But, you don't really want to humiliate yourself by worshipping the feet of a pokemon. And, even if running wouldn't exactly be a bold choice, it is far better than the alternative.

Another cry from the giantess and a poke of her left foot brings you back to reality. And you hastily make your choice...
113312.title: The musical, monolithic Meloetta

11332.content: Well, let's talk Marshadow, even though it's new, would you prefer this story threat...?
11332.title: Hidden within a Shadow...?

choices: You woke up in a grassy plain, with the creature having become giant!
You awake in a small cave, the creature commanding another to shrink you!
113321.content:
It was dark, darker then usual. You've never seen it this dark around your neighborhood at this time of night, whenever you went outside at night anyway. It felt...off, even by your standards.

It wasn't all bad, at least no one was bothering you as you were going back from the supermarket. That's when you finally took notice of your house near the edge of town. This may not go wrong after all...

However, as you soon got to the walkway to your house, you noticed a small "outline" of...a creature out of the corner of your eye. But you didn't notice it until it was right next to you, as though it was invisible. But soon after you did, that outline immediately starting to move, probably in response to your noticing. And before you knew it, you felt a strong pain getting delivered to the crotch, making you drop your groceries! Right then-you felt atrociously hurt, but you weren't knocked out, until the creature seemed to notice based on its movements unfortunately.

That, was when you felt a strong pain against your crotch AGAIN, from behind as it vanished. Finally putting the nail into your coffin, your sleeping coffin. And even before you could fall unconscious, the creature had become fully visible in front of you being rather dark and small, with the top of its head being a mix of blue and green. Its small giggling was all that you could hear as you fell asleep from the pain.

After an hour, without knowing it, your body could tell that the surface you were on was different than what you know your property does. Your mind told you, "Now is the time to wake up, you need to". So you listened, and...
113321.title: The BegInninG of a Troublemaker...

choices: They make you pick who will play with you first!
1133212.content:
Your eyes open up with your mind's command. The first thing you notice is that you're no longer where you were before being knocked unconscious.

You're in a small cave instead, the rock walls barely visible in all this darkness...

Your eyes fully adjust to your dark surroundings, and you notice two creatures standing before you.

One of them is unknown to you. But the other - the color drains from your face as you take a good look at it.

Red eyes, purple body and a sinister, wide-open-mouth grin. A Gengar.

Your gaze shifts on the other creature, the one that apparently knocked you out earlier. Black, small body, funny shape of head and red eyes, which are fixed on you.

"Shad, shadow." the unknown creature says. Its voice is a little more than a simple whisper, yet you detect a feminine tone within it, giving you a close idea of what gender the creature is.

"Gengar." the Gengar speaks up. You notice that it's voice carries the same feminine tone of the other creature.

You take a moment to recollect your thoughts. These two female pokemon knocked you out and kidnapped you. For what reason you couldn't figure out...

The unknown creature looks at the Gengar, and she points at you with a stubby, dark grey finger.
"Marshadow." she cries. Universally, pokemon only speak their names, so you assume that the creature's name is Marshadow.

Whatever she said to Gengar, the ghost/poison type starts snickering in response.
"Gen!" she replies she nodding her head, before turning to you. For some reason, that characteristic grin seems more sinister than before...

The ghost's eyes suddenly glow azure as she stares at you. A blue aura surrounds you, but you find yourself unable to look away. You start to feel very weird, light-headed.

For a moment, you close your eyes.

When you reopen them, the first thing you think is that you must have somehow fell asleep. This must be a dream...

Standing before you are the Marshadow and the Gengar... but they've became giantesses!

... Yet, the cave surrounding you and them didn't even quake... so there's only one logical alternative... the Gengar must have shrunk you down with her powers...

Your attention is drawn as Marshadow walks over you with an unnervingly slow fashion. The giantess stares down at you for a moment, before giggling.
"Sha." she says. For some reason, you interpret this as ‘cute’.

The shadowy pokemon continues:
"Shad shadow." she mutters, ‘You will make a wonderful toy’.

You slowly stand up, staring up at the grey giantess. Slowly, the black pillar that is her left foot rises off the ground and it hovers over you, eclipsing your eyesight even more.

Then, it starts to descend... straight on you!

You close your eyes, bracing yourself for the impact... that never comes.

"Gar!" the Gengar shouts. Marshadow's foot stops in midair as the giantess looks at the purple ghost.
"Sha?"

"Gen, gengar!"

You reopen your eyes. Only to see that Marshadow's facial expression shifted from an amused one to an irritated one. Part of her head turns green as she spreads her arms in protest.

"Shadow!" she shouts, pointing first at you, then to herself.
"Gengar!" the purple ghost emulates her friend's movements. The only difference is that she points to herself in the end.

Realization strikes you. The two giantesses are arguing to decide which one of them is going to 'play' with you first...

Deciding that this is a good moment to try and slip away, you start crawling away from Marshadow's foot.

However, the giantess suddenly turns to look at you.
"Dow!" she shouts, making you halt while also making you physically tremble with fear.

A giant, black paw suddenly gets a hold of you as you're snatched up by the shadowy pokemon, who turns to Gengar.
"Marshadow!" she cries.

"Gengar! Gen gengar!" the poison type replies, clearly demanding the first turn with you, the giantesses' new living toy.

The argument goes on for several minutes more, before the two pokemon finally decide how to mark the end of it...
1133212.title: Two shadows...

choices: Let Marshadow play with you first
Let Gengar play with you first
11332122.content:
The argument between the two pokemon soon comes to an end with one last, irritated cry from the giantess holding you:
"Sha dow!" Marshadow shouts.

Gengar nods her head, agreeing to whatever Marshadow just said.
"Er... what is going on?" you ask the dark grey giantess, whose head returns to its normal color. In response, Marshadow fixes two red eyes on you.
"Dow." she replies, her other paw joining the first one.

Marshadow grasps you against her chest, before walking towards Gengar. Then, the grey giantess bends, releasing you on the ground. You look as she walks back in place.

Both pokemon fix their eyes down on you, expectant look painted on their faces.

Silence falls between the three of you, and it lasts for about three minutes, before Marshadow lets out and annoyed cry:
"Mar!" she says.

"What? I'm sorry, but I don't exactly understand you!" you cry with the same irritation.

In response, Marshadow points first to you, then to herself, then to Gengar.
"Uh, yeah, there's me, you and Gengar. So?" you ask, quite unsure that this is what she meant.

In fact, the two giantesses face palm. Then, Marshadow patiently repeats her actions, this time in a slower manner.

First she points to you.
"You want me to do something?" you ask. The pokemon nods, before pointing to herself and Gengar.
"You want me to do something with you two?" again, the movement of her head is upside down.

Then, Marshadow points to her feet. You blink a few times, not having understood. Marshadow points to her feet again. Your mind tries to put the pieces together.
"You want me... to play... with your and Gengar's feet?" you say, mentally slapping yourself. Of course this isn't what she mean-

You notice the giantesses smiling as you say the last sentence.
"What? I have to play with your feet?" you ask. Both nod their heads.

Knowing that refusing is not an option, you meekly nod. You quickly decide that you'll run away whenever the two fall asleep. It was already dark when you were knocked out. You have no clue of how much you slept, but you judge that it must be night now. The two giantesses will have to go to sleep at some point... right?

You are claimed back to reality as Marshadow talks again:
"Shadow." she says, drawing your attention.
"Uh?" you ask.

This time, Gengar points to you, then to herself and Marshadow, before both cross their arms, sitting down in front of you, their feet rising up, showing you their soles and what lays beneath them.

Marshadow's feet are relatively clean. Sure, the grey soles collected a few small rocks and blades of grass, but nothing more.

But Gengar's feet - they're covered in dirt and grime, suggesting that she does a lot of walking. Something you don't want to play with too much - if at all.

"You, uh, want me to choose..." you suddenly realize. Both giantesses nod their heads.

"You want me to choose who should I play with first? Is that why you were arguing?" you question. Again, they move their heads upside down, before shooting expectant looks again.

You realize that this is the moment: you've got to choice, whether to 'play' with Marshadow's feet or with Gengar's. Since your current situation, you don't want to disappoint either of them.

From what you know, Gengar can be a really nasty pokemon if not pleased. If you refuse to give her the first turn, she may just stomp you into dust when it comes.

On the other hand, you're clueless about Marshadow's powers, since she was an unknown pokemon before you met her. You don't know what she might do to you, and you discover that you really don't want to find out...

"Dow!"
"Gar!" they cry at unison. Somehow, you are able to understand the meaning of their words, ‘Make your choice already!’.

Startled, you turn to both giantesses, unable to choose which one should you start with. Marshadow's feet are cleaner, but you don't know what she might do to you; Gengar's are dirtier, but you know what she could do if you pick Marshadow.

‘Who do I choose?’
11332122.title: Choices

choices: ... they're satisfied for now. They go to sleep...
113321221.content:
Against what your mind is screaming you, you decide to start with Marshadow's feet, which are cleaner than Gengar's.

Slowly, you walk towards the dark grey soles of the shadowy giantess, who smiles, understanding that you picked her first.

On the other hand, Gengar doesn't look too pleased, you can tell by the venomous look she shoots you, making you shiver with dread.

You have little time to think about it though as Marshadow leans forward, scooping you in her giant, grey paw and gets up as she starts to walk, heading away from Gengar, in a dark corner of the cavern and sitting down, before setting you down by her feet.

For a moment, you think about running away right there and then. You wonder if you could make it to the entrance of the cavern and run away from these two giantesses. You quickly discard the idea, though. There's no way you could make it, not in such reduced size.

"Shad." Marshadow calls you back to reality, eager to have her feet serviced. You rise your gaze past her soles to shoot her a questioning look as you silently ask how should you start.

The answer doesn't take long as the giantess rises her left paw, bringing an open palm to her mouth; something red and slick comes out of it. Marshadow pretends to slide it along the length of her palm, before pointing at you by her feet.

A silent, but clear acknowledgement, ‘Lick’.

A lump travels down your throat as you swallow. A quick glance to the dark grey pokemon tells you that she's not kidding at all. You really have to lick her feet...

You sigh as you walk closer to the dark sole, placing your hands on it. You reluctantly open your mouth, stick your tongue out and lean forward, closing your eyes to not witness yourself doing such humiliating thing such as licking someone's feet.

--

You find that what you are currently doing is totally weird. Marshadow's feet aren't as warm as you expected them to be; it's like this pokemon barely has bodily warmth, and this foot is almost immaterial. It's like you're trying to lick smoke.

However, the soles of the giantess have got a taste which, while not exactly pleasing, is not disgusting. Sure, when your tongue made the first contact with her sole, you were tempted to retreat it back in your mouth and throw up. However, you slowly get used to the taste as you keep licking.

While performing said task, you use your hands to remove the small rocks, the grass and the dust from the pokemon's sole, allowing you an easier task. Still, you have to deal with the unpleasant taste and with the smell of her feet, which is weird as well. Like the taste, the foot of the giantess smells like smoke, mixed with the smell of the grass crushed beneath it.

The shadowy giantess giggles the whole time, barraging your ears with that low, ghostly giggle of hers. You're not sure if that is because you are tickling her or because you must look so pathetic to be of amusement to the giantess.

Soon enough, you finish licking the first foot and pull back, trying to hold what you just swallowed in your stomach. You feel dizzy and humiliated at the same time.

However, Marshadow pays your feelings no mind as she pokes your body with her left, still uncleaned foot.

"Ca-Can I have a minute?" you ask. The giantess' head lits of a green color as she frowns. The answer is clear.

You sigh as you start walking towards her left foot, starting what you already did to the other one...

--

"Do-Done..." you dizzily mutter as you stumble back, away from the Marshadow's foot. You've done the same thing twice, yet you could swear that the second foot was even worse than the first!

You casually look to Marshadow, noticing her checking your work. All the rocks, the grass and the dust were removed from her feet. You look at her visage, noticing her expression shifting: her eyes close, and a smile spreads wide across her face.
"Shad dow." she happily says, one of the two feet reaching your face as she gently pats your right cheek in a playful manner.

You're barely able to mutter a ‘You're welcome’ that a dark purple paw snatches you up, and one grinning Gengar gives out a cry:
"Gar!" she says triumphantly.

Without giving you or Marshadow any time to react, she moves to the opposite side of the cave.

Before you know it, Gengar had unceremoniously dropped you on the ground. You ungracefully land, your back hitting the ground. A painful grunt escapes your mouth as the ghost type sits in front of you, her dirty feet rising up.
"Gar!" she says, her arms crossing as she looks at you.

You only assume that how to please the Gengar's feet is up to you. However, you have a feeling that if you don't do a good job, your remains won't be able to regret it...

--

You were right. Gengar didn't like the fact you picked Marshadow first.

You had opted to not lick the feet (your stomach had too much for one day), and chose to simply clean them with your hands.

However, Gengar hadn't the intention to make it easy for you; For the whole time, she has been constantly kicking you or pinning you beneath the dirty soles of her feet.

As a result, dirt now clings to every inch of your clothes.

But nothing could be compared to the smell.

It was like smelling poison (no surprise from a poison type), but mixed with dirt, crafting an intense smell that tortured your nose for the whole time. At least, Marshadow's feet didn't smell that bad.

You bless the moment you pull back, having cleaned the second foot too.
"Happy now?" you ask with well-concealed disgust.

Gengar snickers in response, before her left foot darts forward as she gently kicks you away.

That is when you see Marshadow coming out of the ground, her lower body submerged in a shadow.

From what you know, hiding within shadows is a thing Gengar can do. But, apparently, Marshadow is able to do so as well. The only logical explanation you can think about is that she must be a ghost type too.

Your train of thought stops as both pokemon giantesses step in front of you, standing at full height above you, giving you an idea of how small you are.

You desperately hope that this is it, that they're done. That they'll just go to sleep now, so you'll have a chance to escape and - possibly - get help with your second problem - your reduced size.

You notice the two giantesses staring at you intently. And from Marshadow's smile and Gengar's grin, you realize that...
113321221.title: Shadow feet

1133212211.content:
You watch as the two talk to eachother for a few moments, before Gengar gives out a yawn, suggesting that she's sleepy.
"Dow." Marshadow says, shaking her head, before her gaze fixes straight on you, who are by her feet.

The giantess smirks, and you notice her lower body sinking within the shadows of the dark cave. When half her body is submerged in the shadow, she moves a paw, lightly patting your head with it. You assume that she's thanking you for the good - or at least decent - work you've done with her feet.

Then, the giantess' body slides down, her head disappearing in darkness.
"W-Wait-" you mutter, dreading the chance of being alone with Gengar. But a quick glance around reveals that she's no longer around.

She must have already slipped into the shadow, you decide. Without even bothering to thank you for your work, or for the torment she's put you through.

You find that you don't care too much about it. The only one thing that matters now is another: escaping.

You glance around, examining the cave to check if the two pokemon really disappeared. It is said that if a Gengar watches someone from the shadows, they would feel naturally observed. Plus, the body temperature would fall to 5 °C. You assume that it's the same thing for Marshadow.

You stand still for a few moments.

...

Well, your body temperature certainly didn't fall. And you don't feel watched either. The only logical conclusion you can think of is that the two ghosts fell asleep, allowing you to move freely.

To escape this nightmare.

Without even thinking twice, you start walking through the cave, to the point where you notice a small exit, moonlight slightly pouring inside.

You walk towards the exit and stop for a moment to enjoy fresh air, not the poisonous smell of Gengar's feet, or the weird smell of smoke of Marshadow's feet.

Sadly, while you greedily fill your lungs with fresh air, a figure slowly emerges from your own shadow, soon towering above you.

Feeling observed, you turn around to inspect your shadow.

However, your heart skips a beat as you notice Marshadow standing there, looming over you, her head turned green and a frown on her face as she stares daggers down at you.
"Uh... Hi Marshadow?" you try.

In response, the giantess rises her foot above your head. It slams down on you. Not with enough force to kill you, but surely with enough force to put you in a lot of pain.

"Dow!" the giantess above cries, pressing her sole onto your form.

"Please... I'm sorry..." you manage to say, before the foot rises again, landing on your chest, knocking the air you managed to inhale out of your lungs.

You give a weak cry of pain as you feel your body in incredible pain.

But Marshadow gives no sign of wanting to stop soon. You tried to escape, she's punishing you. Her foot rises again, only to fall with great strength on a casual part of your body, making you cry out in pain.

Again, it rises and slams down. As it does for several other times.

Rise-slam, rise-slam, rise-slam, rise-slam, rise-slam, rise-slam, rise-slam, rise-slam.

Your body goes through more and more pain as the giantess keeps stomping you.

You can only hope that this won't last as long as you expect it to last...

--

Only after several minutes of stomping your now fragile form, the giantess stops. Still, the pressure doesn't leave your body as she keeps her left foot on you.

Then, it rises just a little bit, giving you a chance to breath.

Beaten, weak, unable to talk properly, you look up to the giantess. Her head returned to its characteristic grey color, but the frown is still present on her face.
"Dow! Sha!" she exclaims, ‘Do that again! See what happens!’.

"I'm so-rry..." you somehow manage to speak. Your words seem to have an effect on the giantess; her gaze shifts into a softer one, and her foot rises from your body.

Then, the giant, dark grey paw of Marshadow reaches you as the pokemon giantess bends, gently picks you up and walks over a dark corner of the cavern.

"Dow." you hear her mutter, her voice returning to its usual low tone. Perhaps she's been a little too harsh with you, but you needed to learn your place. You had been punished enough, she decides.

The giantess thinks to herself. She couldn't let you try to escape again, so she has to keep you close to her somehow.

A giggle escapes her mouth. That's an easy task.

Your world shakes as the pokemon giantess lays down, without losing her grip on you. And you watch with horror as Marshadow...
1133212211.title: Failed attempt

choices: Marshadow slowly took you out of her foot...
She lied to Gengar, wanting to keep you to herself alone
11332122112.content:
Your heart pounded your chest from within; you wanted to scream, but your vocal chords seemed to be unable to produce any sound.

And slowly, unstopped, Marshadow's hand moved to her left foot. Ironically, it was the one that reduced you in the pitiful state you were in right now.

And, unable to even squirm in the grip of the giantess, you could only watch as she moved you in front of her sole, the one sole you licked clean earlier today.

It was no surprise when you saw it once again covered in dirt and small rocks. Did she want you to polish her feet again as a punishment for trying to escape? You sure hoped not...

But your fear of cleaning feet with your tongue turned to be wrong: as you neared the sole, you noticed Marshadow smirking.

It was like she was deliberately taking as much time as possible to subject you to a still unknown torture.

But if finally happened.

Your body touched the towering sole of the foot; then, the paw literally pushed you into it.

You became agitated as your mouth was, once again, invaded by that familiar taste of smoke.

But it wasn't even the beginning.

In fact, as the paw behind you kept pushing, you suddenly found the almost immaterial wall in front of you seemed to melt around you, becoming softer...

"No!" you suddenly retrieved your ability to speak, but you couldn't do anything as you were pushed deeper.

The foot was literally absorbing you.

Your hands rushed to the sole, your feet did too as you tried to pull yourself back; but the more you struggled, the more Marshadow increased the strength of her paw.

Your arms were the first that were sucked into the shadow foot. You tried to pull back by pushing your feet against the hungry sole of Marshadow, but she simply smirked at you, her fiery red eyes glued on your form as she pushed you inside her foot.

A fitting punishment, you sourly thought, since you were the size of an ant and given what Marshadow liked to do with shrunken humans such as yourself.

Your legs were devoured by the shadow foot too.

You gulped: you couldn't feel your limbs anymore, it seemed like they had disappeared behind the other side of the sole.

Your body followed, until just your head was stuck out of the towering sole, a finger of the giantess on top of it.

The shadow pokemon shot you one last, mischievous look, before the finger pushed on your head, and everything disappeared.

Marshadow pulled back, satisfied, and slowly retreat into the shadows.

There was no way the human could escape.

--

The first thing you noticed after your head was absorbed by the foot was that you were in a pitch black place that smelt like Marshadow's feet (no wonder, given where you actually were).

Your cruel entrapment was totally weird, you thought: you were trapped in an almost immaterial but yet very solid place. Coldness surrounded you.

Shortly after your arrival on the other side of the foot, you tried to push yourself out the way you came in, but the foot quickly became touchable again, keeping you from escaping.

"Hey! Let me out!" you screamed, your scream causing the surface within the foot to vibrate.

It was weird to think that you were inside of a pokemon, but you had no time to think: you had to get out.

Sadly, you got no reply.

Trying to use the least amount of oxygen possible, you tried to struggle to get out of here, but you achieved nothing but a giggle (presumably coming from the giantess you were trapped in) causing the whole foot to shake.

You stopped for a moment to study your surroundings.

Your prison wasn't skin-tight, but was nonetheless still very small, like a tiny, circular cage. There was barely space for you to sit down: it was going to be a miracle if you didn't suffer from claustrophobia whenever you got out of here.

If you ever got out of here.

But, on the bright side, there seemed to be enough air for you to breathe. Aside from that, your prison was nothing but a smelly, cold and tight, little cage.

You made a few more meek attempts to get out by struggling, getting Marshadow to giggle again.

Around you was the sound of a drum beating, but you knew that it probably was the heart of the pokemon, so loud because you were inside of her; a secondary, less loud sound that you registered as her breathing could be heard too and, judging by its slowness, Marshadow was probably asleep, but was nonetheless enjoying the massage you were providing in her sleep.

After ten minutes of struggling uselessly, you fell onto the bottom of the smelly paw, exhausted.

You laid down the best you could, resigned to the fact that there was no way to get out unless Marshadow willed it... and you weren't so sure that was something that was going to happen anytime soon.

You closed your eyes, deciding to catch some sleep.

Marshadow was probably going to let you out in the morning.

...

Right?

The last thing you felt before you drifted off was the bad smell of the foot, before that too faded as you fell asleep.

--

Morning came into the cavern where two certain shadow pokemon slept.

Hidden within shadows, the giantess whose body you were sleeping in was sleeping soundly.

Until...

"Gar!"

Two red eyes opened.

"Gengar!"

Slowly, the legendary emerged from the shadows, remembering about her companion.

She found Gengar staring around the cavern with a venomous gaze, and it wasn't hard to understand the reason of it: the human they had shrunken and used like a foot toy was gone.

"Dow?" Marshadow chimed as she stood up, feeling a tingle under her left foot... or in her left foot.

The shadow pokemon suddenly smirked to herself as she remembered the events that had occurred last night: she had punished the human for trying to escape, then she had put him inside her foot to prevent him trying to flee again.

And Gengar didn't know...

The purple ghost-type suddenly turned around, noticing Marshadow smirking to herself.

She approached the smaller pokemon.

"Gen?" she asked.

‘Where is the human?’
11332122112.title: A really dark night

1133321.content:
It was another happy night at camp. Your name was Robert and you were chilling like a sea cucumber near the fire. Nearby, spunky Chikorita thst named Oregano was happily sniffing he grass with glee. While your cold and honestly kinda edgy riolu or you named her, Anu, was behind the tent, she was probably mimicking some crazy pose from those jothoian cartoons that she liked to watch. While your toxapex was just sleeping in lap, you haven't figured out what was a good name for her yet. All was tranquil and peaceful you and your new team of pokemon, the earth shoke violently and leafs from whirled away intensely...as some tall being slowly landed a kilometer away from your camp. You and your awake Pokémon looked on in shock and fear. Never before in your blossoming The creature lets out an soft feminine whine as it scans surroundings. It sounded like she or it was deeply sad and depressed until saw the light from your camp fire!

It's mouth curved into a joyful and pleased smile as approach you and all. Your starter was beyond frightful to the point where you had to calm her down by stroking on her leaf while Abu had a dark and eager look. The edgy tomboy finally get to truly test her metal! Her battle with mysterious creature was going to be legendary!

Your newest addition was grumbling, indicating that commotion with giant's foot falls and Oregano's shivering was slowly bringing her into the waking world.

What happened next?
1133321.title: Nothing  to see here.

11333211.author_name: P O S T  B O Y
choices: The creature commands you pamper her feet.
Still feeling angry and stressed for being assaulted, she gets rough with you.
Your other two pokemon injects, they are not going let you suffer!
11333211.content:
Much quicker than you expected what she was capable of, Anu leaped over the tent and came rushing at the white and green creature! The little black legs became a blur of motion as she stretched out a palm. She ignored your whiny protests and calls as she leaped into the air.

"Cel- STESLES!" The being called out in utter pain and surprise as the smaller riolu landed a well-placed fore palm at it's the surprisingly paunchy and soft midsection. It's young voice continued to yelp as Anu's superior speed and small size to its full advantage. Its large disconnected bamboo limbs tired sending gushes of gust and even physically swatting away the young aura pokemon, but Anu was proven to be as elusive as the peskiest fly as she continued her hit and run tactics. This is how she managed to battle and beat heavyweight pokemon like Rhyhorn and Onix in the past.

"ANU, STOP THIS RIGHT THIS MINUTE!" You screamed in the most commanding tone you have ever made in your life, it managed to stop the Riolu in her tracks. But this gives the monster, the chance she needed! The creature's many fingered hand smashed on top of Anu! You and the rest of your skin paled heard the Riolu call out in pain and surprise. You felt your heart nearly stop beating as you saw the telltale sign of a green glowed its fingers gained.

It was using Absorb!

"Wait...p-please stop!" The cries of Anu getting weaker by the second as you approached the gigantic otherworldly pokemon while both of your other pokemon came to save their comrade with no avail, her grip was too strong for their weak under evolved bodies to manage. "Please....le-let Anu go! It's wrong o-of her to attack yo-you for no reason. I'm her trainer...and she and the rest are my responsibility! So punish me INSTEAD!"

All of your pokemon called out in protest with fear for your wellbeing clear in their eyes, even the icy Riolu with a rebellious streak a mile wide weakly cried. Showing that she does care about you! The furious and livid look on the being's face soften, even she was moved by your words.

"CelCelste!" The creature sat....down? You and your pokemon looked on as the creature's tubular feet began to flex and spasm? Just what the hell is it doi-

*SPLUECH!*

One by one, her "feet" peeled off from the bottom of her body like a sticky bandage, revealing that the tubular appendages were a pair of strange organic and suspiciously geta like sandals that you could only assume the creature must have grown herself over time and was fused with her real feet. This seems to cause an entire forme change as the creature adapted into a completely terrestrial form with its typing switching from steel/flying to Steel/grass.

Speaking of which, the creature's real feet rapidly pulsed and expanded into its natural gigantic form. Like a Jynx, the creature's own feet were incredibly human-like in both curves and shape. The only difference was had it's four fat toes instead of five. With a sharp moan, She scrunched her toes as hard as she could, making her chubby soles incredibly wrinkled, and when then she heard a nice pop. She did the same with her other foot, this time pushing her toes against the ground, giving you a perfect view of her clearly wide sole. Now that she wasn’t scrunching her toes, she could see that the bulky sole was incredibly thick and broad, but not really that wrinkly. It looked incredibly puffy, like a super plush pillow or the toe beans on a cat pokemon like a Glameow or Skitty. The toes had very nail markings on top of them that was light green in color. Despite being a greyish white in color like the rest of its body, the feet were quite filthy and dusty. The soles were covered with an alien orange and dark green...dirt you think? That and it's slick and moist vicious gooey sweat that more than likely helped with the feet and sandals becoming one. The discarded "flesh" sandals were positively dripping with this stuff, and the pitch-black cavernous footprint of the sandals told you that she has indeed had them for probably of its life. Judging from the way Oregano covered her nose with her leaf and toxapex quite curiously sniffing the strange foot wear, poison types do like dank pungent smells, after all. You can only imagine the powerful fetid they had.

While a part of your being was rightfully disgusted by this, you couldn't feel the eldritch pair of feet to be well...a little sexy. Stupid kink continues to mess up things in your life even now.

"Cels" The creature sternly spoke with a finger directed at you. Telling you to come to her...

What happens next?
11333211.title: And this is why aliens don't talk to us.

choices: Began to tie you to the bed
114.content:
Trees pass in a blur around you. Your legs are screaming in agony with each stride, but you put it out of your mind. Focusing on the Pokemon Center on the edge of town is what is keeping you from giving way to the pain coursing through your body. Panting and drooling, you burst through the double doors of the Center and erratically make your way up to the desk where the Nurse looks concernedly at you.

"What ever happened to you??" Nurse Joy said excitedly.

"My pokemon and I...(wheeze) we we're (COUGH) we we're attacked.. outa no where by a crazy Scyther!"

"Oh my you're pokemon must be in critical condition! Nurse Chansey, I am going to aid these pokemon the best I can. You wait with this trainer and see if he needs anything."

"CHANsey!" exclaimed the pink pokemon.

The Chansey viciously grabbed your hand and pulled you towards the inn rooms stationed next to the pokemon Center.

"Wait! I-" you started. But Chansey yanked you so that you could not finish your plea. You followed her to the topmost room in silence. When she opened the door, the small room you entered had only room for a desk with a phone, a bed, and a rug. You were extremely worn out from running, so it was no surprise that when Chansey shoved you onto the bed you fell with little effort. You began to relax when suddenly the Chansey...
114.title: Chansey

1142.content:
You lie down with your eyes closed, expect the Chansey to leave you in peace. As roughly as she acted before, you didn't give any thought to it until you opened your eyes again to see her smiling face looking back at you. As you open your mouth to say something the Chansey begins to wave her small hands back and forth, seemingly chanting her name over you.

ChanSEY chan chanSEY...ChanSEY chan chanSEY...

You settle back down again. "Probably some healing move that Chanseys learn." You didn't know much about the pokemon. You begin to fall asleep. With the tension of your injured pokemon being healed off your mind you can relax. However, moments later something wakes you up quite quickly. You look down at yourself, then look around at the room, and see that you're SHRINKING! Now at about 1/3 your original size, you shoot up in bed to try and escape. It's only now that you notice that the Chansey has pulled up the guard on the bed that is normally used to keep injured patients from rolling out of bed. Now they are being used as a cage to keep you from getting out period. You stare up at the gigantic pokemon before you. With her Minimize attack complete, Chansey plants her eyes back on the now minuscule you. WIth astonishing grace, Chansey hops the guard and lands sitting on the bed. The impact of her landing rockets you up in the air. You then land, on your back, between her massive pink footsies.
1142.title: Shrink you

11421.content:
The strange part in all of this is that it seems as though this Chansey has done this before. I goes through the motions flawlessly and with such vigor you can only assume you aren't the first.

You wonder what could have possibly happened to the other who have been through the same recent circumstances as you. It seemed almost unbelievable that a pokemon KNOWN for its kindness and motherly instinct would have bring harm to another living thing.

These thoughts shoot through you head as you stare up at the Chansey's foot. It had stood up and was now slowly about to step on you. Maybe it was not it that was in slow motion, but rather your perception of time itself do to the incredible event occurring. Either way it did not matter as foot had just slammed down over you. You are partly crushed into the bed and partly pressed up into the Chansey's sole. The sole smelled like dirt and sweat, and everything that the pokemon had walked in that day.
11421.title: Chansey: Stomp you

114211.content:
In the utter darkness underneath the Chansey's foot, you survey your surroundings. You could barely make out the confines of your sweaty prison as half your face was sinking into the sole flesh of the foot above you. You practice opening your mouth and moving your arms and legs but the intense pressure of the foot pushing down on you limited your movement.

Suddenly, the foot above you began to move. Chansey started to roll you gently beneath her gargantuan foot. The feeling it gave her felt like a massage. Sure she was still using you as a tool for her relaxation, but at least you weren't being stomped on anymore. The worst part of the experience was being forced face-up to her worn soles. The smell almost became unbearable as her feet began to sweat by using you in such a way. After she had thoroughly rubbed down her one foot, she removed it from you only moments before crush you ith the opposite one. Then the foot massage process started all over again.
114211.title: She's gentle

The Chansey was not parading around the bed, shouting her name and making extra sure to STOMP you with extra pressure each time she made a round. You watched her in amazement as she walked around to the top and then the foot of the bed, then came walking right on top you you. She did this several times; it almost seemed like a little victory dance to you. When she was done, she plopped down on the bed in from of you. You looked back up at her, wondering what she was going to do next.

She reached into her egg pouch and pulled out a length of twine...

But then your legs were tied down as well you you were now incapable of movement.

She up off the bed and onto the ground. Was yo hit the ground you were forced into her sole even more.

What does she do now?

123221.title: Buneary

123222.content:
So, is that Lopunny yours, or did you encounter it in the wild?

Your Lopunny is a nice and caring Pokemon. You trained with her since she was a Buneary. A hard road it way, but she eventually liked you enough to evolve. Now that you've obtained a Lopunnite, you can finally Mega Evolve her. However, Mega Lopunnies are well known for their aggressive tendencies. What will happen to your Lopunny when you Mega Evolve it?

A wild Lopunny you've encountered is well known among the local wildlife for her cruel streak. She beats all who dare enter her domain into submission, and turns them into helpless playthings with a combination of Minimize and Baton Pass. Her games have yet to have a happy ending for any of their unwilling participants.
Also, she's a shiny, 'cause why not~?
123222.title: Lopunny

choices: She remains gentle and kind, however much it was changed.
1232221.content:
As you think about your Lopunny, you suddenly remember that she loves to be out in the wild, with her trainer, as opposed to being in a Pokeball like most of her other kin when captured.

And so, you let out her with a simple click of the Pokeball’s button, as she immediately does a graceful spin-dance, before she then raises her hands in joy towards you. She was quite the high-spirited girl, wasn’t she?

As you plan to test out the newly-obtained Lopunnite that you have acquired, and integrated into your Mega Stone, you began to consider something, about what you said earlier.

Would it be a morally Just idea to risk altering Lopunny’s personality, by invoking her Mega Form, giving her the aggressiveness she has repressed, and possibly shattering her fitting personality of pure friendliness, innocence, kindness and generosity, just so that she could tap into the unknown potential she never knew she had? Even if it was merely a temporary change... The emotional and mental consequences that you and she would suffer are not light indeed.

After having to self-debate for so long, you decide that a trial must be done, for her and your sake. As a Trainer, you need power to maintain your relations with your held Pokemon, or they will eventually lose their trust in their Trainer as they grow more and more experienced. It’s either you take advantage of her trust that evolved her, to gain her true power, in order to solidify your rise to power, or risk losing her anyway, when the inevitable comes from so many random battles.

With a worried mind, you raise and activate the Mega Stone, as it speed forth the rainbow energy that unlocked the Mega Forms of so many Pokemon, as it enveloped Lopunny in a cyclone of prismatic flames, before it dissipated to reveal her new form.

Her long furred ears were now tied off into sections, as they themselves turned long and thin, with beige cuffs of fur between each section. The tufts of fur on her forepaws has been altered into cylinder-like squishy pseudo-gauntlets that covered her forearms. On her legs, you could see that there were black webbing over them, as they had several holes of varying size, much like torn stocking fabric, and her feet bore fur that were shaped like boots on the top, as there were rings of fur around the middle of her lower legs. The long eye-brows she had merged into a symmetrical butterfly at the centre of her forehead. What’s more, her figure changed from a endowed body to a more lithe one, to accent her change in biological focus,

No longer did you see a innocent angelic bunny-girl, who only fought battles with pity and kindness to her opponents, even as she held back as if she didn’t want to harm them seriously, and a held a aura of purity, innocence that made her adorable and cute to most Trainers. In her place was a more sharper and refined beauty, as her posture were more rigid and controlled, as her expression reflected little of her former pacifism and kindness, as they were replaced by feelings of loyalty, duty and respect, as well as her eyes radiating a stoic look, as if she has turned from a whimsical beauty to a refined female warrior who fought for the sake of respect and loyalty.

As the transformation ended, you prayed that her inner heart and mind would remain unchanged in this form. And the results were...
1232221.title: Mega Lopunny Time

choices: Stomps at yoiur body with her paws.
Slides her paw towards your face.
12322211.content:
Suddenly, while you were trying to figure out whether she has changed significantly or not, your Lopunny, in its Mega Form, surged forward with speed and power befitting her new transformation, as you only felt something impact your chin, before your world was turned upside-down in a mere spilt-second,

Stunned by the sudden attack, you remain still for a moment, before you raise your head slowly and shaking, to see that the Mega Lopunny was not happy at all, and judging from her posture, with one of her legs raised, it must have been the ball of her foot-paw that hit you from under your head.

Her eyes were filled with righteous scorn and anger, as she was moving herself closer to you step by step, as her footsteps were much stronger and heavier compared to her standard form.

And then the reason for what she did clicked. You’ve spent so long looking at her, with close eyes, that she has mistook it for ogling at her figure. Normally, Lopunny would only pour at such a lewd act, but she won’t hold it against you. Her Mega Form... Does that need explaining, after the recent events?

You try to get up, before you’re pinned down to the ground by her right foot-paw pressing your chest down. For once, you could see her eyes flare, as she is considering how to punish you. You can only hope that she’ll let up as quickly as possible.

She...
12322211.title: Her aggressiveness rears it head

choices: Follow her orders, and become her slave
Refuse, and see where tha gets you
Lopunny has a different idea, devious idea
1232222.content:
"Darn it! Blissey! Use Softboiled again!"

"B... Blissey!"

The pink Pokemon did as ordered, and used the move to heal herself... Only to have that effect mostly undone, as she was once again forced to tank another Jump Kick to the face from your opponent. You really didn't expect things to get so sour. Blissey was supposed to be this super annoying to deal with wall of a Pokemon, yet right now she was being toyed with by a freaking Lopunny. The wild, lop-eared Pokemon easily ran circles around her opponent, delivering one Jump Kick after another, while dodging Blissey's Hyper Beams and Focus Blasts with ease. Once she ran out of those moves, your Pokemon was forced to tank Lopunny with Softboiled, and hope she misses some of those Jump Kicks to knock herself out.

No such luck. Lopunny landed each and every single one of her moves. Now that she didn't have to run and dodge, she just stood still a short distance from you and Blissey, always waiting for her turn. This gave you an ample opportunity to notice a certain device she's been wearing: Wide Lens! So that's why she wasn't missing! How did she come across it? Gah, no matter. She had it, and you had to deal with it now. With that thing one, the Lopunny would always land her Jump Kicks, unless you lowered her accuracy somehow... Or if Blissey raised her evasion.

Here it was, the moment of truth. You ordered Blissey to heal again, but she wouldn't do it. She ran out of Softboiled. This was what Lopunny's been waiting for. Seeing her opponent unable to act, she immediately went for a finishing Jump Kick, not knowing you still had one trump card up you sleeve...

"Blissey! Use Minimize!"

At once, Blissey shrunk herself down, effortlessly dodging the Lopunny's attack. You watched as Lopunny flew over her target, and went on a crash course... With you?

Oh crap.

Unable to react to that, you could only watch as the Pokemon's paw went straight for your face. Closer and closer it came, its details becoming more intricate as it approached. You felt as if time itself slowed down to a crawl, just to let get a good look at her foot. It's three, plump toes, the sweaty pawpads that adorned their undersides, as well as the big one right in the middle of her sole. As it came even closer, you could also notice the dirt, and blades of grass that got stuck to it.

Ironically, the last thing you saw before the blow that knocked you out cold was Lopunny's own face. She was smiling.

---

When you finally regained consciousness, you could instantly that tell something was not right. You tried to move, get up, anything really, but you couldn't. Something was preventing you from moving. Your whole was bound by what appeared to be... Grass? Grass Knot, of course. Who could be responsible for this, though?

"Lop Lopunny~"

The lop-eared Pokemon dropped suddenly from above, having apparently spent the last who-knows-how-long sitting on top of a tree branch, waiting for you to wake up.

"Hey!" You yelled at the smug-looking Pokemon, who stood above you triumphantly "What's the big idea!? Release me right this instant, if you know what's good for you!"

The Lopunny merely giggled in response, amused by your empty bravado. You were in no position to make demands, yet here you were arguing with her as if you two were equal. How cute~
Still, it was slightly bothersome to have you so rebellious and spirited, when she had plans for you that required your complete subservience. Fortunately for her, Lopunny knew exactly how to bend you to her will...

The Pokemon reached for something she held stuffed in one of her 'ear fluffs', and presented it to you. You stopped fidgeting almost immediately as you noticed it, for in her hand Lopunny held another Pokemon. A familiar-looking, scared, pink blob...

Oh no. Since the battle wasn't technically finished yet, the effect of Minimize must've persisted all this time.

"Blissey!" you shouted out loud, enraged by the sight of your partner in peril. With what strength you could muster, you leapt forward at Lopunny, hoping you could knock her off balance. Sadly, it didn't come to be, as Lopunny swiftly moved aside, letting you fall flat on your face instead. You quickly resumed trying to break free from your bonds, but things only got worse, as your kidnapper called forth even more Grass Knots, tying you to the ground, with your face turned to the side, giving you a good view of your surroundings.

Carefully, Lopunny placed your Blissey a short distance from your face, and then used Grass Knot to prevent the egg-shaped Pokemon from running away. You couldn't believe just how small she was, like at most the size of your thumb. The two of you stared at one another for a bit, before looking up as something blotted out the light.

Lopunny towered above the two of you, looking proud and mighty. Though both of you lied at her feet, her focus was entirely on your Pokemon. Lopunny carefully rose her dainty paw in the air, poising it above Blissey's small form, and to your utter shock and terror, began its agonizingly slow descent.

It took Blissey a bit to get over the initial disbelief, but once she did, her panicked cries filled the silence around you. You didn't understand what she was saying, but you could tell that she was begging to be spared, pleading for her life. It didn't matter to Lopunny one bit, however, and she responded with a sinister giggle.

"Please, stop!" You yelled, joining Blissey's cries. The paw momentarily stopped in mid-air, the dominant Pokemon eyeing you in curiosity. Seeing how you failed to follow that up with anything, however, she resumed her deadly ploy. Now Blissey started screeching at you, seeing how your words had some effect on the cruel Pokemon.

"N-no! I beg you! Leave her alone! It's m-me you want, isn't it? I-I'll do anything, just please let her go!"

That seemed to do the trick. Just as her sole was about to press your scared Pokemon into dirt, it stopped. Lopunny left it hanging there for a bit, probably to give your terrified Blissey a good look at the pawpad that was about to become her final resting place. However, once she was done teasing your helpless Pokemon, she didn't set it aside. Instead, the cruel rabbit moved her paw towards your face.

You watched curiously, as she set her paw to hang in front of your nose, wiggling her toes around in a teasing manner. You wouldn't willingly nose breath with that thing around, but unfortunately Lopunny saw to it that you did, as once again she used Grass Knot to tie your mouth shut.

With no other option, you took a whiff of her paws, and instantly regretted it. They smelled as bad as they looked, reeked of dirt, trampled grass, and (of course) sweaty feet. Although there was some mysterious, sweet tinge to it that you couldn't quite explain. Maybe it came from some unlucky flowers that ended up beneath her stride.

Or some sweet-smelling Pokemon, you thought morbidly.

For a while you just stared at her outstretched paw, wondering what she was planning on doing, while cringing with every single fetid sniff she forced you to take. Suddenly, you heard Lopunny clear her throat, drawing your attention to her. Once you were looking at her, the rabbit Pokemon pointed at her paw, and made one, long, cruelly drawn out licking motion in the air. Then, with a snap of her finger, the Grass Knot over your mouth came off. You were free to breath again... And to follow her command.

Lick her foot clean. Slowly, and diligently. Debase yourself at her feet for your sake, as well as the sake of your Pokemon.

Can you do it?
1232222.title: A wild Lopunny attacks!

choices: The Lopunny orders you to move on to her toes
You feel the grass knots have slackened. Try to escape!
12322221.content:
You really, really don't want to do this. The foul scent of the Lopunny's fetid paws was still plaguing your nose, and the mere thought of putting your tongue anywhere near them was enough to make your stomach twist itself into a tight knot.

But, looking back down at your Blissey silently pleading with you, you realize you don't have a choice. You're not sure if the Lopunny would carry through her threat, but you're not about to risk it. Clenching your eyes shut, you hesitantly press your tongue outwards. It doesn't take long before it finds its target, quickly pushing into the warm and furry sole. You gingerly move it upwards, feeling the grime, dirt and fur caked to the underside rabbit pokémon's paw rub off against it as you complete your first lick.

While the texture of the foul mess you managed to collect is absolutely revolting, with the gunk sticking all over the inside of your mouth and the grit, fur and crushed blades of grass getting stuck between your teeth, you're surprised to find the taste, while still pretty bad, isn't quite as disgusting as you feared. It's mostly just salty, with the occasional hint of some fruit, berry or other thing unfortunate enough to be crushed beneath bipedal rabbit.

Knowing she won't let you go after just one lick, you lean in for a second go. And then a third. And a fourth. You quickly settle into a rhythm: First pressing your tongue hard against her heel, lapping upwards to collect whatever grime you can until you pass her main paw pad, then pulling the filth back into your mouth to scrape it off against your teeth and moving in for the next go.

Wanting to avoid focusing on the buildup of gunk in your mouth, you peek open an eye to see that the Lopunny's sat down at some point, eyes closed in relaxation as she enjoys your efforts, clearly content to have you serve her for as long as she pleases. At least the paw currently dominating your vision looks cleaner now, much of the dirt and grime clinging to it before having cemented itself in your mouth. The main pad has even started to turn bright pink once again, shining with your saliva as her plump toes happily wiggle above you, showering you with of their jam and dirt as they eagerly wait for their turn to enjoy your service.

Noticing your Blissey has gone oddly quiet, you twist your head around to check if she's still ok. To your relief, she doesn't look hurt but... there's clearly something wrong. She's acting odd, almost mesmerized as she intently stares at you slurping away at the rabbit pokémon's paw with a soft smile on her face and a clear blush on her cheeks. It takes a while before she notices you watching her, but this luckily seems to snap her out of her stupor, the small egg-shaped pokémon suddenly looking away from you in a panic as you see her blush grow a deeper crimson.

She's definitely acting weird It could be an effect of the prolonged minimize, or some sort of shell shock as she sees her trainer debase himself before another pokémon. In Any case, you don't really have any time to think about it as...
12322221.title: Follow her orders, and become her slave

choices: Lopunny did notice, and decided to punish Blissey
Lopunny didn't notice, and continues to torment you
Blissey offers to take your place, and clean Lopunny's other paw
123222211.content:
"Lop Lop~" you heard the rabbit Pokemon calling for your attention. Seeing how you didn't have much else to do at the moment, you reluctantly shifted your gaze back to the domineering Pokemon.

You immediately regretted that decision, as per her cruel shtick, Lopunny decided to ram her still filthy, unattended paw into your face, and clamp her grimy, foul-smelling toes around your nose. You tried to get around her malicious ploy by breathing with your mouth, but only ended up playing right into her paws. Without warning, Lopunny rose her other foot to your mouth, and stffed it with her plump, revolting toes.

This was pure nightmare. With your mouth shut by one of her filthy paws, you had not choice but to breath in the reeky scent of her toes. Its intensity was beyond compare, no doubt the worst smell you've ever had the displeasure of experiencing. Its pure, unfiltered foulness made you shiver in disgust, your eyes watering due to its sheer pervasiveness in your system. Breath in, cringe in revulsion, breath out. Over and over again.

Your tasting buds weren't faring much better. Through your watery eyes you were able to discern Lopunny doing a licking motion with her tongue, essentially ordering you to lick her toes clean. Just for clarity, she wiggled her putrid digits in tandem with the licking, leaving no room to misunderstand her body language. She wanted your tongue to get in there, and do some serious work. You had no guts nor will to refuse, not when she literally had you writhing at her feet, powerless to get out of this funky mess.

Damn, you couldn't even take a deep breath before 'digging in'. With what little strength you had, you started lapping at Lopunny's toes, mentally cursing every single decision that led to you this moment. You knew not how it was possible, but for some reason the grime on her toes tasted way worse that what you had to deal it when cleaning her main pad. It was much saltier, nowhere near as tolerable as it was, and its texture made it much less pleasant to just gulp down your throat like you did with her paw.

Licking all over her toes took you way longer than her cleaning her paw, if only because you felt much more tired. However, even after all this damned effort, you were still not done with the task. Just as you thought it was finally over, Lopunny let out a devilish giggle as she spread her toes as wide as she could, leaving you with two, putrid toe crevices to work on.

This was it, the 'final boss' of your torment. The fetid mesh that Lopunny carelessly allowed to fester in-between her plump digits. The residue of all that she ever stepped on, crushed, and squashed could be found there, dating who knows how far back. Even things that shouldn't taste bad, like remnants of fruits and berries, were already way past their prime, and rotted into more gunk and toe jam.

'Cleverly' enough, you actually took a deep, long breath before getting on with your job, just to split your attention between those two vastly different, but equally overwhelming sources of disgust. It did the trick well enough, and you were able to get through this phase without pausing too much... Even if each passing moment made you feel as if you were standing at death's doorstep.

It took a bit, a dreadfully inflated bit in your opinion, but Lopunny eventually dragged her legs back to see how well you did, leaving you to your own devices. You were still tightly bound by her Grass Knot, but just being able to take a deep breath of clean air was enough to bright tears of joy to a broken man like you.

All of a sudden, you started feeling much, much better. The aftertaste of Lopunny's foot grime left your mouth completely, as did the memories of her putrid odour. You began to look for the source of this great, refreshing feeling, and once you did finally locate it, it moved you to tears.
Your dear Blissey has managed to break her grassy bonds. However, instead of running away from Lopunny, she made her way towards your still immobilized form, and once close enough started throwing Heal Pulse after Heal Pulse at you, hoping that it would make you feel any better. It did, and you couldn't think of proper words to describe how thankful you were, not that you even had to. You already did so much for her sake, demeaning yourself before this rabbit just so she wouldn't suffer instead. She had to help you make it through this nightmare somehow, even if it meant risking her own well-being.

This beautiful moment sadly had to be cut short, as Lopunny was done checking out her freshly cleaned paw, and was now ready to make you give her other paw a similar treatment. Blissey rushed back to her spot, and clumsily covered herself with some grass blades, hoping her giant tormentor wouldn't notice that she freed herself from their grasp...
123222211.title: The Lopunny orders you to move on to her toes

choices: Uh-oh, looks like you missed a spot.
1232222112.content:
Blissey was trembling like a leaf, eyes clenched tightly shut in fear as she tried to avoid the giant rabbit's notice. She didn't have anything to worry about, Lopunny had been way to preoccupied inspecting your work. The pokémon turned her foot this way and that, even jamming a finger deep in between the crevices of her fuzzy toes to check for any leftover gunk. Not able to find any, she raises the foot into the air with a deceptively innocent giggle, flexing and wiggling the plump digits to simply enjoy the feeling of having them move, unburdened for the first time in god knows how long by the impressive amount of grime and filth they had collected over the years.

Your reprieve didn't last for long as she was quickly pulled out of her little game by noticing you were still bound helplessly before her. She slowly lowered her paw back down as she extended its sibling in front of your face. Once again your view was dominated by the rabbit's disgusting sole. It looked like a war zone, with the crushed remains of countless things stuck fast to the vast expanse of the Lopunny's paw, pulped beyond recognition underneath the pokémon's powerful stride and glued in place by the foul cement-like mixture of dirt, grime and her sweat.

Not content by just having you gaze at her foot, the Lopunny tries to your attention by clenching her toes. You're snapped out of your daze as you hear the thick digits squeeze together with an audible squelch, forcing some of the long built up gunk out from between them. Looking back up at the pokémon, you're given your next order as she casually opens her mouth with a soft "Looo~".

Knowing what will follow, but realizing you have no choice, you obey. Slowly, hesitantly, you open up your own mouth, offering it as a home for the fetid toes alread wriggling in anticipation in front of it. You've already managed to polish off one paw, the other can't be worse, right?

You realize you made a mistake as soon as the sadistic bunny shoves her furry digits inside. The dirt you licked off from her sole had shielded you from the worst taste of her toes earlier. While your Blissey's heal bell had revitalized you enough to take on the second foot in the first place, it had also removed all the the grime left coating your mouth, leaving it once again clean and pristine.

Ready to be befouled all over again by the Lopunny's fetid paws.

An ice cold shiver ran over your back the second your tongue brushed against the underside of one of the rabbit's toes. Any hope for some respite was dashed as the invading digits mercilessly advanced deeper inside. Tears start to well up in your eyes again at the foulness your experiencing, soon breaking into a heavy coughing fit as you feel one of her claws poke against the back of your throat. In the midst of your suffering, you realize your tongue had somehow found its way between two of the bunny's foul little piggies, finding salty, crusty fur and simi-solid sludge wherever it turns. Your feel your stomach spasm in protest against it all, and are barely able to avoid bringing the previous load of filth back up.

The Lopunny, meanwhile, gleefully watches you choke on her foot. The way you wriggle and writhe against your bonds like a worm, the soft sobs you make as you try to regain control of your body's violent protest against her foul feet, and the fact she can immediately render your best efforts futile with a mere flex of her tootsies has completely enraptured her, and she continues to toy with you like this for a good while longer.

Eventually though, you manage to fight off your body's instinctual reaction. The struggle has completely tired you out, and you've yet to even start actually cleaning the paw. Pathetically, but desperate to end your torment, you start to suckle on one of her toes. After matting down her fur with a fresh coating of your saliva, you use your tongue to massage the pad underneath, enticing the filth that has been caked to it to take up residence in your mouth. Then, dreading the next part, your force your tongue in between the toe and its neighbor, using it to forcefully excavate glob after glow of unnameable foul sludge. You feel your body shudder with every mouthful you force down your throat, the disgusting mess sitting heavily in your stomach.

You suddenly feel the pokemon's paw push against your dazed face, wiping itself up and down. It seems your tormentress wants you to finish your job. Taking your cue, you start obediently lapping away at her sole. As a small mercy, it seems the foulness of her toe-gunk has robbed your tongue of the ability to taste anything for a while. When you feel like you're probably smearing more grime back onto her foot than your licking is removing you decide to stop, not resisting as you see her paw slowly fall down on top of you. You can feel her toes happily thrumming on your head as she uses your face as an impromptu footrest.

Soon, you feel the furry expanse lift from your face as the rabbit inspects your work.
